reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.rtings.com/humidifier/reviews/best and extract every humidifier they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award category, price, coverage area, tank size, noise level, runtime, type (cool mist/warm mist/evaporative), pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.reviewed.com/canada/home-outdoors/best-right-now/best-humidifiers-canada and extract every humidifier they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price in CAD, key specs like tank size and coverage area, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.ctvnews.ca/shopping/home/best-humidifiers-canada.html and extract every humidifier they recommend for Canada. For each product get: full product name, their category or award, price in CAD, key features, pros, cons.

Go to https://www.techgearlab.com/topics/health-fitness/best-humidifier and extract every humidifier they rank. For each product get: full product name, their ranking and score, price, coverage area, tank size, type, pros with test details, cons.

Go to https://madeinca.ca/best-humidifier-canada-tested/ and extract every humidifier they tested. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price in CAD, key specs, pros with specific test results, cons.
